String query = 
    "SELECT " +
    "  SC_AS400_To_DropZone.Sno, " +
    "  SC_AS400_To_DropZone.PhaseNo, " +
    "  SC_AS400_To_DropZone.Is_Active, " +
    "  SC_AS400_To_DropZone.Get_columns, " +
    "  SC_AS400_To_DropZone.AS400_Schema, " +
    "  SC_AS400_To_DropZone.Country, " +
    "  SC_AS400_To_DropZone.AS400_FileName, " +
    "  SC_AS400_To_DropZone.Filename, " +
    "  SC_AS400_To_DropZone.Table_Name, " +
    "  SC_AS400_To_DropZone.LoadType, " +
    "  SC_AS400_To_DropZone.Delimter, " +
    "  SC_AS400_To_DropZone.AS400_System, " +
    "  SC_AS400_To_DropZone.AS400_Host " +
    "FROM SC_AS400_To_DropZone " +
    "WHERE SC_AS400_To_DropZone.Is_Active = '" + context.Is_Active + "' " +
    "AND SC_AS400_To_DropZone.Country '" + context.Country + "' " +  
    context.whereclauseand + " " +
    "AND SC_AS400_To_DropZone.FileName NOT IN ( " +
    "  SELECT SRC_ASSET_TXT " +
    "  FROM " + context.SC_Metadata_DB + ".AUD_EXEC_LOG " +
    "  WHERE DATA_PIPLN_ID = '" + globalMap.get("DATA_PIPLN_ID") + "' " +
    "    AND data_date = '" + context.Datadate + "' " +
    "    AND RSLT_DESC = 'Pass' " +
    "    AND Job_Name = '" + context.Id_Job_Name + "' " +
    ")";

System.out.println(query);
